competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

provider.name: FIFA Official API

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Roberto Alvarado (Mexico).
Attempt blocked. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 阿尔瓦拉多射门被封堵。 吉尔伯托·莫拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Érik Lira (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Gilberto Mora (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Jorge Sánchez.

events.description: 吉尔伯托·莫拉射门偏出。 豪尔赫·桑切斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Luis Romo (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.

events.description: 路易斯·罗莫射门偏出。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Luis Romo with a cross following a fast break.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门偏出。 路易斯·罗莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Julián Quiñones (Mexico).
Attempt blocked. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 阿尔瓦拉多射门被封堵。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Willian Pacho.
Attempt missed. Gilberto Mora (Mexico) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the right following a corner.

events.description: 吉尔伯托·莫拉射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! Mexico 1, Ecuador 0. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a through ball.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯破门。 比分 1-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Enner Valencia (Ecuador).
Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Goal! Mexico 2, Ecuador 0. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯破门。 比分 2-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by César Montes.
Foul by Nilson Angulo (Ecuador).
Foul by Julián Quiñones (Mexico).
Attempt saved. John Yeboah (Ecuador) left footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top left corner by Raúl Rangel (Mexico). Assisted by Willian Pacho.

events.description: 约翰·耶博射正。 威廉·帕乔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Raúl Rangel.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Roberto Alvarado.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Jorge Sánchez.
Attempt missed. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Gilberto Mora with a cross.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门偏出。 吉尔伯托·莫拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Jorge Sánchez.

events.description: 劳尔·希门尼斯射门偏出。 豪尔赫·桑切斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Ecuador. Ángelo Preciado replaces Joel Ordóñez.

events.description: 安杰洛·普雷西亚多替补登场，换下乔尔·奥多内斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Ecuador. Yaimar Medina replaces Alan Franco.

events.description: 亚马尔·梅迪纳替补登场，换下艾伦·弗兰科。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Mexico 2, Ecuador 0.
Julián Quiñones (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 阿尔瓦拉多射门偏出。 基尼奥内斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Alan Franco (Ecuador) is shown the yellow card.
Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Gilberto Mora (Mexico) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Jesús Gallardo (Mexico).
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Jorge Sánchez.
Attempt missed. Pedro Vite (Ecuador) left footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Gonzalo Plata.

events.description: 佩德罗·维特射门偏出。 贡萨洛·普拉塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Gilberto Mora (Mexico) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Érik Lira.

events.description: 吉尔伯托·莫拉射门被封堵。 埃里克·里拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Ecuador. Enner Valencia is caught offside.
Foul by Piero Hincapié (Ecuador).
Substitution, Mexico. Brian Gutiérrez replaces Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯替补登场，换下吉尔伯托·莫拉。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Ecuador. Kevin Rodríguez replaces Enner Valencia.

events.description: 凯文·罗德里格斯替补登场，换下恩纳·瓦伦西亚。

qualifiers.espnText: Piero Hincapié (Ecuador) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Willian Pacho (Ecuador) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Julián Quiñones.
Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Willian Pacho.
Attempt saved. César Montes (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Hernán Galíndez (Ecuador). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross.

events.description: 塞萨尔·蒙特斯射正。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Mexico. Conceded by Hernán Galíndez.
Attempt missed. Johan Vásquez (Mexico) header from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Roberto Alvarado with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 约翰·瓦斯奎兹射门偏出。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Roberto Alvarado.
Substitution, Mexico. Obed Vargas replaces Luis Romo.

events.description: 奥贝德·巴尔加斯替补登场，换下路易斯·罗莫。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Mexico. Santiago Giménez replaces Raúl Jiménez.

events.description: 圣地亚哥·吉梅内斯替补登场，换下劳尔·希门尼斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Moisés Caicedo with a through ball.

events.description: 凯文·罗德里格斯射门偏出。 莫伊塞斯·凯塞多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Kevin Rodríguez (Ecuador).
Foul by Piero Hincapié (Ecuador).
Substitution, Ecuador. Jordy Caicedo replaces John Yeboah.

events.description: 乔迪·凯塞多替补登场，换下约翰·耶博。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Ecuador. Kendry Páez replaces Nilson Angulo.

events.description: 肯德利·佩兹替补登场，换下尼尔森·安古罗。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Mexico. Orbelín Pineda replaces Julián Quiñones.

events.description: 奥贝林-皮内达替补登场，换下基尼奥内斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Mexico. Israel Reyes replaces Roberto Alvarado.

events.description: 伊斯列尔·雷耶斯替补登场，换下阿尔瓦拉多。

qualifiers.espnText: Gonzalo Plata (Ecuador) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Ecuador. Conceded by Jorge Sánchez.
